# F009. News Sentiment + LightGBM Event Model

## Positioning

This candidate turns news and sentiment into an event-aware alpha filter rather than assuming text should trade directly. The safest version uses the text as a gate and lets the LightGBM score decide how much conviction is left.

## Reference Basis

- [FinBERT Financial Sentiment Analysis](../../references/papers/5_01_FinBERT_Financial_Sentiment_Analysis.pdf) - finance-sentiment baseline
- [FinGPT Open Source Financial LLMs](../../references/papers/5_02_FinGPT_Open_Source_Financial_LLMs.pdf) - finance-LLM event extraction
- [Large Language Models in Finance A Survey](../../references/papers/5_11_Large_Language_Models_in_Finance_A_Survey.pdf) - finance-LLM landscape reference

## Repo Anchors

### Operational Guardrails

Shared safety and execution rails used by every candidate before a signal can touch capital.
- [src/risk/manager.py](../../../src/risk/manager.py) - pre-trade risk gate and position haircut
- [src/brokers/paper.py](../../../src/brokers/paper.py) - paper-safe broker adapter
- [src/monitoring/health.py](../../../src/monitoring/health.py) - freshness, heartbeat, and kill-switch checks
- [src/backtest/engine.py](../../../src/backtest/engine.py) - deterministic offline backtest runner
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - queue-aware synthetic fill model
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - runtime health loop and stale-data monitor

### News and Event Stack

Stream or replay news inputs, event timestamps, and sentiment features for event-aware trading.
- [src/ingestion/websocket_client.py](../../../src/ingestion/websocket_client.py) - replay/stream ingestion for event-driven inputs
- [src/ingestion/loader.py](../../../src/ingestion/loader.py) - news or preprocessed corpus loading
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - event feature construction
- [src/models/lgbm.py](../../../src/models/lgbm.py) - event classifier or event score model

### Cross-Sectional Ranker

The executable ranking path that turns scores into a tradable long/flat or top-k book.
- [src/models/lgbm.py](../../../src/models/lgbm.py) - LightGBM scoring model
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - feature matrix construction for the ranker

## Data / Feature Bundle

- Use a news corpus or replay stream plus the event timestamps that line up with price data.
- Convert article sentiment into a point-in-time feature so late headlines do not leak into the future.
- Join the event features with the same technical and risk matrix used by the ranker path.

## Execution Path

- Raise or lower conviction based on the event score instead of entering blindly on the text alone.
- Let the LightGBM score absorb the sentiment as one more feature rather than as the entire trade.
- Route the event path through the same paper-safe and health-checked execution rail as F001.

## Risk Controls

- Deduplicate articles and reject stale news timestamps.
- Do not let delayed headlines create hidden lookahead.
- Use the health loop to freeze the event engine when the stream freshness or heartbeat degrades.

## Validation Gates

- Test on event days versus non-event days and compare against F001.
- Measure whether the sentiment feature improves drawdown more than it adds noise.
- Check the false-positive rate on neutral or repetitive news cycles.

## Archive Triggers

- Archive if sentiment only adds lag.
- Archive if duplicate news handling becomes too brittle.
- Archive if the model is weaker than a plain technical ranker after fees.

## Next Step

Use this as the event-aware template for F027.
